inputs.prompt:
ACTION ONLY
A tiny rented Mumbai room, Iter 3 housing style, cramped but clean. Single bed against the wall, plastic chair, old study table, notebook filled with handwritten ideas, ring light in one corner, clothes hanging behind the door, small ceiling fan spinning slowly.

24-year-old Nisha sits alone in the room recording content on her smartphone. Multiple failed takes. She records a line, stops, deletes, tries again. Frustration visible.

She opens a notebook and writes ideas. Records again. Stops again.

Camera cuts between:

Ring light glowing
Phone mounted on books
Nisha recording
Rewatching her own videos
Looking disappointed
Refreshing her phone repeatedly

No screen visible.

No UI visible.

No dialogue.

Only determination mixed with frustration.

She clearly knows how to create content but doesn't know how to grow it.

Natural realism.

Authentic creator struggle.

Warm tungsten lighting.

Documentary style.

Handheld camera.

FRIEND DIALOGUE
Duration: 3–4 sec
Dialogue

Friend(the girl in green is talking):
"Tu try toh kar rahi hai lekin tareeka nahi aata tujhe. Seekho App khol."

pause

"Wahaan se script likhna seekh."

OMNI PROMPT

College canteen near Mumbai campus.

Busy afternoon.

Students sitting around chatting.

Tea cups, notebooks, backpacks.

Nisha sits across from her female college friend.

Nisha, the girl with the phone appears frustrated and confused.

Friend listens carefully.

Friend leans forward.

Supportive energy.

Not lecturing.

Not judging.

She points toward Nisha's phone.

Natural conversation.

Medium shot.

Over-the-shoulder coverage.

Friend speaks directly to Nisha.

Nisha listens thoughtfully.

The advice lands.

A small realization appears on Nisha's face.

Natural lip sync.

Authentic Indian college environment.

Warm sunlight.

Casual youthful energy.

Human AI realism.

nisha says
" Mujhe banana toh aata hai lekin grow karna bilkul bhi nahi. Ek din ek friend boli....Growth ka raasta waha pe samjhi maine. Writing Viral Instagram Reel Script' — yahaan se script likhna seekha."

nisha says
" Phir comments, phir followers, aisa lag raha tha ki sapna hai. Aaj assi lakh log mere lafz padhte hain. ."

tier 3 tiny rented room.

Same setup.

Same ring light.

Same creator desk.

Now Nisha is more focused.

More confident.

She sits late at night taking notes.

Writing scripts in a notebook.

Practicing lines repeatedly.

Recording reels.

Editing content.

Recording again.

Learning.

Improving.

Fast montage.

No screen visible.

No app UI visible.

Only actions.

GROWTH MOMENT

Nisha uploads a reel.

She waits.

Refreshes.

Waits again.

Suddenly her face changes.

Curiosity.

Then surprise.

Then disbelief.

Then excitement.

INFOGRAPHIC ANIMATION

Premium cinematic floating infographic elements emerge around her.

Not attached to the phone screen.

No visible UI.

No app branding.

Floating around the room.

VIEWS GROW

20K

35K

50K

75K

100K

The numbers rise around her.

Soft glowing particles.

Reflections on her face.

COMMENTS ARRIVE

Hundreds of floating comment bubbles.

Reaction icons.

Discussion indicators.

Reply chains.

Conversation graphics.

No readable comments.

Only visual engagement signals.

FOLLOWERS INCREASE

+2K

+10K

+25K

+50K

+100K

Follower counters rise upward around her.

The room slowly fills with floating success indicators.

NISHA REACTION

She looks around in disbelief.

Smiles.

Laughs softly.

Covers her mouth.

Almost emotional.

Refreshes again.

More growth.

More engagement.

More followers.

The feeling that a dream is becoming real.

FINAL SHOT

Camera slowly circles around Nisha.

The small room remains exactly the same.

Nothing else has changed.

Only the numbers around her have changed.

The audience understands:

Her circumstances stayed small.

Her reach became massive.

End on Nisha smiling at her phone as floating engagement graphics illuminate the room.

Human AI realism.

Netflix commercial quality.

Premium motion graphics.

Photorealistic.

Premium "Asli Kahaani" podcast studio.

Warm amber lighting.

Dark wood interiors.

Soft cinematic bokeh in the background.

Nisha sits opposite the host.

Camera already in a close-up from the previous line.

She has just finished saying:

"Main nahi chhodungi."

A small smile appears on her face as she remembers her mother's stubbornness.

The host smiles subtly.

A brief moment of admiration.

Dialogue

"Lekin sir..."

Nisha leans slightly forward.

The smile becomes more reflective.

Camera slowly pushes closer.

Dialogue

"Maa ab bachon ko silai sikhati hai ghar par."

As she says this, her eyes brighten.

Not emotional.

Proud.

The pride of seeing her mother work by choice rather than necessity.

A small smile remains.

The host nods respectfully.

Camera

Slow cinematic push-in.

Very subtle handheld movement.

Documentary realism.

No cuts.

Single continuous take.

Dialogue

"Aur woh aunty jisne mere se batameezi se baat ki thi..."

The smile fades slightly.

Not from anger.

Only remembrance.

She briefly looks away for a split second.

Then looks back at the host.

Dialogue

"Ab woh meri aankhon mein dekh bhi nahi pati..."

Pause.

Calm delivery.

No revenge.

No satisfaction.

No bitterness.

Just truth.

The host's expression changes.

He understands the significance.

Final Line

"Sharminda hoke."

Nisha says it gently.

Almost sympathetically.

Not as a victory.

Not as payback.

Just as a fact of life.

PERFORMANCE DIRECTION
Nisha

Beginning:

Proud daughter

Middle:

Quiet happiness

Ending:

Graceful dignity

The audience should feel:

She won without trying to win.

Life changed.

She changed.

But her character didn't.

CAMERA DIRECTION
Start in close-up
Slow push-in throughout
Natural eye movement
Minimal gestures
Hold on face after final line
VISUAL STYLE

Photorealistic human AI

Authentic Indian female creator

Premium podcast studio

Warm amber lighting

Netflix interview quality

85mm lens

Shallow depth of field

Natural skin texture

Realistic lip sync

Documentary realism

Cinematic color grading

Subtle facial micro-expressions

Vertical 9:16

END FRAME

After:

"Sharminda hoke."

Silence.

Camera holds for 1 second.

Nisha gives a tiny thoughtful smile.

Host remains quiet.

The statement lands naturally.

SHOT 2 (1.5–4 sec)

Medium close-up on Nisha.

Relaxed smile.

Confident posture.

No hesitation.

Dialogue

"aur woh mujhe bahut paise bhi dete hai."

small nod

"Sir, gareeb hone ka show nahi karna mujhe. Gareebi se निकल ke aana — woh dikhana hai. Yeh fark hota hai."

Delivered naturally.

Not bragging.

Not showing off.

Matter-of-fact confidence.

A calm confident smile.

Host silently nods.

Audience understands her philosophy:

Don't glorify struggle.
Show what's possible beyond it.

she says, looking directly to teh camera with confidence
" Seekho khol. Apne lafzon ko tareeka do. Kyun ki — tumhari mehnat aur हुनर tumse koi nahi cheen sakta.  "

A realistic Tier-3 Indian middle-class home at night. Warm yellow tube-light illumination, intimate household atmosphere. Kajal, a 26-year-old Indian woman wearing a mustard yellow kurta with a light blue dupatta, sits at a small wooden table carefully practicing an intricate bridal mehendi design on her own hand. She is visibly tired after a long day but remains focused, delicately drawing fine floral and paisley patterns with a mehendi cone.

The table is cluttered with several empty mehendi cone wrappers, tissue papers, and practice sheets, showing months of effort and dedication. Beside her hand lies a smartphone with the screen clearly visible. Instagram profile open. The screen prominently shows 114 followers, no direct messages, no booking inquiries, no bridal orders, low engagement notifications. The phone screen should be sharp and readable.

Standing near the bedroom doorway in the background is her mother-in-law, a middle-aged Indian woman wearing a dark green saree, grey hair tied back, reading glasses hanging from her neck. She stands with crossed hands, visibly frustrated and disapproving. She wrinkles her nose slightly as if bothered by the strong smell of fresh mehendi in the room. Her facial expression conveys disappointment, skepticism, and annoyance without speaking.

Foreground focus on Kajal's delicate mehendi work. Midground focus on the phone screen displaying 114 followers. Background focus on the judgmental mother-in-law standing at the entrance.

Kajal briefly glances at the phone screen, noticing the lack of orders. Her eyes become slightly watery. A subtle feeling of failure and self-doubt fills the room.

Photorealistic Indian faces, realistic skin texture, authentic middle-class Indian home, emotional storytelling, natural body language, realistic mehendi texture, cinematic depth of field, warm practical lighting, subtle shadows, premium social media advertisement quality, realistic smartphone UI, ultra detailed hands, shallow focus, emotional realism, 4K commercial film look.

Camera

Medium-wide shot slowly pushing in toward Kajal.

Lens

50mm cinematic lens, f/1.8 shallow depth of field.

Mood

Quiet disappointment, hard work without results, emotional struggle before transformation.

Negative Prompt

extra fingers, distorted hands, unreadable phone screen, exaggerated expressions, glamour makeup, luxury interior, western home, cartoon style, unrealistic lighting, blurred Instagram UI, duplicate people, deformed mehendi patterns, oversaturated colors, AI artifacts.

A realistic middle-class Indian bedroom at night, warm yellow tube-light illumination. Kajal, a young Indian woman in a mustard yellow kurta and light blue dupatta, sits at a small wooden table practicing intricate bridal mehendi on her own hand. Empty mehendi cone wrappers and tissues are scattered across the table, showing months of effort.

Her smartphone lies beside her with Instagram open, clearly displaying only 114 followers, no order inquiries, and no messages.

In the doorway stands her mother-in-law, a middle-aged Indian woman wearing a dark green saree with reading glasses hanging around her neck. She wrinkles her nose slightly as if bothered by the smell of fresh mehendi. Her arms are folded and her expression is frustrated, skeptical, and judgmental.

The camera slowly pushes toward Kajal while keeping the mother-in-law visible in the background. Kajal continues drawing mehendi quietly but looks emotionally exhausted.

The mother-in-law shakes her head slightly and speaks naturally in Hindi with a realistic Indian accent:

Sasu Maa Dialogue (lip-synced Hindi):
"6 mahine ho gaye bahu... ek paisa bhi nahi aaya. Yeh online-wonline apne bas ki baat nahi."

As the dialogue finishes, Kajal briefly glances at the phone screen showing 114 followers. Her eyes become watery and her hand slows down. The room feels emotionally heavy and silent.

Camera: Slow cinematic dolly-in, handheld realism
Lens: 50mm cinematic lens
Lighting: Warm practical household lighting, realistic shadows
Mood: Disappointment, doubt, emotional pressure
Audio: Natural room ambience, ceiling fan hum, distant neighborhood sounds, realistic voice performance

Negative Prompt

cartoon, overacting, exaggerated expressions, glamour makeup, luxury house, studio lighting, western interior, smiling mother-in-law, unreadable phone screen, extra fingers, distorted hands, artificial emotions, dramatic Bollywood acting, subtitles, text overlays, low realism, CGI look, beauty filter, AI artifacts.

'Roz daali reel.

log reel kyun chhod dete hain.

Continuation of the previous scene inside the same modest middle-class Indian bedroom at night. Warm yellow household lighting. Kajal sits alone at the wooden table covered with mehendi cone wrappers and practice sheets.

The mother-in-law's taunting words have just ended. The room becomes quiet.

Medium close-up on Kajal.

She remains completely silent. She doesn't argue back. She keeps staring at the unfinished bridal mehendi design on her hand while holding the cone motionless.

A long pause.

Her eyes begin to fill with tears. She blinks repeatedly, trying hard not to cry. Her jaw tightens slightly. She takes a small breath and swallows her emotions.

The camera slowly pushes closer.

Kajal briefly looks toward her phone screen showing only 114 followers and no orders. The disappointment hits harder.

Her eyes become glossy. A tear almost forms but she quickly looks down and blinks it away. She forces herself to stay composed.

Her lips tremble slightly for a moment before she regains control.

She lowers her gaze toward the unfinished mehendi design and gently places the cone down beside the steel bowl.

She does not cry openly.

She is trying very hard to hide her pain.

The expression should feel deeply relatable—someone who has heard criticism many times before and has learned to suffer quietly.

Camera

Slow cinematic push-in from medium close-up to tight close-up.

Lens

85mm portrait lens, shallow depth of field.

Lighting

Warm practical tube-light, realistic household shadows, subtle catchlight in eyes emphasizing moisture.

Acting Notes
No dramatic crying.
No sobbing.
No wiping tears.
Eyes becoming watery.
Repeated blinking to stop tears.
Lip tremble for less than one second.
Silent emotional breakdown hidden behind self-control.
Visual Focus
Watery eyes
Trembling lips
Unfinished mehendi design
Phone screen showing lack of success
Feeling of isolation despite being in her own home
Negative Prompt

melodrama, Bollywood crying, tears streaming down face, loud emotions, exaggerated acting, smiling, glamour makeup, beauty filter, luxury interior, cinematic rain, dramatic music video style, overacting, cartoon emotions, AI artifacts, distorted hands, extra fingers, unrealistic facial expressions.

Night inside a modest Tier-3 Indian middle-class bedroom. Kajal, a 26-year-old Indian woman wearing a mustard yellow kurta and light blue dupatta, sits alone on her bed after hearing criticism from her mother-in-law. The room is dimly lit by warm household lighting.

Over-the-shoulder camera angle from behind Kajal. The backside of her smartphone is clearly visible in her hand as she continuously scrolls with her thumb. Her posture is slightly slouched, showing disappointment and exhaustion.

A realistic floating smartphone UI overlay appears beside her, synchronized with her scrolling movements.

The UI displays her phone gallery containing hundreds of mehendi videos:

Bridal full-hand mehendi designs
Arabic mehendi patterns
Chappa mehendi designs
Time-lapse application videos
Next-day dark red color reveal videos
Detailed cone work close-ups
Wedding mehendi transformations

The gallery scrolls rapidly, revealing months of content creation and effort.

The UI transitions into her Instagram reels page.

Every reel shows extremely low engagement:

42 views
37 views
51 views
46 views
39 views

The low view counts repeat across multiple posts.

Kajal's thumb continues scrolling.

The UI changes to successful competing mehendi artists.

Instagram pages display:

8.2K followers
15.4K followers
12.7K followers

Comments and messages appear:

"Bridal booking available?"
"Karwa Chauth slots open"
"Waiting list full"
"Book your date now"

Beautiful bridal clients and successful mehendi businesses fill the screen.

Kajal pauses scrolling.

The UI transitions to her own Instagram profile.

The page looks empty.

Only 114 followers.

No booking inquiries.

No unread messages.

No orders.

Her thumb stops moving.

A moment of silence.

She stares at the screen for a few seconds.

Disappointed, she exits Instagram and locks the phone.

Her face reflects quiet defeat.

Photorealistic Indian woman, realistic smartphone interaction, authentic Instagram-style UI overlay, social media advertisement cinematography, emotional realism, realistic hand movement, natural scrolling behavior, cinematic depth of field, warm practical lighting, ultra-realistic phone graphics, premium commercial quality.

Camera

Over-the-shoulder shot from behind Kajal.

Lens

50mm cinematic lens.

UI Direction

Floating screen-recording style overlay occupying 35–40% of frame.

Phone remains physically visible in Kajal's hand throughout.

Mood

Months of effort.
No results.
Comparison with successful creators.
Growing self-doubt.

Negative Prompt

Night inside a modest Tier-3 Indian bedroom. Kajal sits alone on her bed, holding her smartphone. Warm household lighting creates a quiet, emotional atmosphere.

Close-up of her thumb scrolling through her Instagram reels.

A visual montage rapidly shows the passage of time:

Different calendar dates changing over several months.
Kajal uploading reel after reel of bridal mehendi designs.
New posts appearing consistently.
Multiple reels showing similar engagement numbers:
42 views, 47 views, 39 views, 51 views, 45 views.
Month after month passes, but the numbers barely change.

The camera slowly pushes closer.

Kajal continues scrolling through her own profile. Her expression becomes increasingly confused and discouraged.

Quick flashes of her best work:

Bridal full-hand mehendi.
Arabic designs.
Dark color reveal videos.
Detailed cone work.

Despite the quality, every reel remains stuck around 40–50 views.

She pauses scrolling.

Close-up on her face.

Her eyes move thoughtfully as she starts analyzing her profile. She scrolls back through older posts, studying them carefully.

She tilts her head slightly, wondering what she is doing wrong.

The camera circles slowly around her.

She opens a few reels again, watches them critically, comparing thumbnails, captions, and opening seconds.

A feeling of self-reflection replaces disappointment.

She rests her chin lightly on her hand, staring at the screen.

The final moment shows Kajal looking determined but confused, silently searching for answers on how to improve and grow.

Camera

Over-the-shoulder → Phone close-ups → Slow push-in to face → Circular movement around Kajal.

Lens

50mm cinematic lens, shallow depth of field.

Emotion

Confusion → Frustration → Self-analysis → Desire to improve.

Visual Style

Ultra-realistic Indian creator journey, authentic social media struggle, natural acting, realistic smartphone UI, premium commercial storytelling, emotional but hopeful.

Negative Prompt

crying, dramatic breakdown, success indicators, viral reels, high follower counts, exaggerated reactions, luxury room, glamour makeup, cartoon UI, unreadable screen, overacting, AI artifacts, unrealistic social media interface.

(reference image 1 is kaja and image 2 is sunita)A realistic Tier-3 Indian middle-class home dining area during evening. Warm household lighting, authentic lived-in atmosphere. Kajal and her neighbor Sunita are sitting together at a simple dining table.

Kajal, a 26-year-old Indian woman wearing a mustard yellow kurta with a light blue dupatta, looks visibly stressed and emotionally exhausted. She holds her smartphone in both hands and leans slightly forward while showing it to Sunita. The backside of the phone is visible only. The phone screen is never shown to the camera.

Kajal gestures while explaining her struggle. Her body language reflects frustration, confusion, and disappointment after months of effort. She occasionally shakes her head, sighs softly, and looks worried.

Across from her sits Sunita, a friendly Indian woman in her early 30s wearing a simple saree. She remains calm, patient, and attentive. She listens carefully without interrupting, maintaining eye contact and showing genuine concern.

Sunita leans forward slightly, trying to understand Kajal's problem. Her facial expression gradually changes from curiosity to surprise as she realizes how much work Kajal has already put in.

The conversation feels natural and supportive. Kajal occasionally points toward the phone while explaining, while Sunita nods thoughtfully and listens.

The camera captures subtle emotional moments:

Kajal speaking with frustration.
Sunita listening quietly.
Kajal feeling stuck despite hard work.
Sunita beginning to understand the issue.
A supportive friendship dynamic.

No phone screen visible at any point. Only the back of the phone is shown naturally in Kajal's hands.

Photorealistic Indian women, authentic Tier-3 household environment, realistic facial expressions, natural conversation body language, emotional realism, warm practical lighting, cinematic depth of field, premium social media advertisement quality, realistic Indian dining room, relatable female creator journey.

Slow cinematic push-in as Kajal talks.

Occasional over-the-shoulder shots showing only the backside of the smartphone.

A realistic Tier-3 Indian middle-class dining area during evening. Warm household lighting. Kajal and her neighbor Sunita are sitting across from each other at a simple dining table.

Kajal looks emotionally drained and frustrated. She holds her smartphone and turns it toward Sunita while explaining her situation. The audience only sees the backside of the phone. The screen is never visible.

Kajal speaks with worried hand gestures, occasionally pointing toward the phone and expressing confusion through her facial expressions. Her posture is slightly slumped, showing the weight of months of effort without results.

Sunita sits calmly and attentively, listening without interrupting. She maintains soft eye contact and occasionally nods, allowing Kajal to vent her frustrations.

As Kajal continues explaining, Sunita's expression gradually changes from curiosity to surprise. She realizes how much effort Kajal has put into her work.

Kajal scrolls briefly on her phone while showing it to Sunita, still keeping the screen hidden from the camera. She shakes her head slightly as if saying, "I've tried everything."

Sunita leans forward, becoming more engaged in the conversation. She listens carefully, thinking about a possible solution.

The scene ends with Kajal looking defeated and confused, while Sunita appears thoughtful, as if she has just understood the real problem and is about to help.

A realistic Tier-3 Indian middle-class dining room. Warm evening household lighting. Kajal and Sunita sit across from each other at a simple dining table.

Kajal looks discouraged and emotionally exhausted after explaining her struggle. Her shoulders are slightly slumped, and she avoids eye contact for a moment, feeling defeated.

Sunita sits calmly beside her, leaning slightly forward with a caring and supportive expression. She gently places her hand on the table near Kajal in a reassuring manner, speaking like a close friend rather than giving advice.

The camera stays mostly on a medium two-shot, occasionally cutting to close-ups of their faces.

As Sunita talks, Kajal listens quietly. Her expression slowly changes from disappointment to curiosity and hope. She begins paying closer attention.

Sunita speaks naturally, warmly, and confidently, as someone who genuinely wants to help a friend. No preaching, no lecturing—just simple, relatable encouragement.

Sunita Dialogue (Natural Hindi, lip-synced):

"kajal, mehandi sabko nahi aati — tujhe aati hai. Par reel chalana bhi seekhna padta hai. Main Seekho से सीखती हूँ।. Tu bhi dekh aur seekh wahan se."

While speaking, Sunita smiles reassuringly and nods slightly, encouraging Kajal not to give up.

Kajal looks at Sunita with growing interest. For the first time in the story, she appears to feel understood. A subtle spark of hope appears in her expression.

The scene ends with Kajal attentively looking at Sunita, ready to listen.

Night inside a modest Tier-3 Indian middle-class bedroom. Warm yellow household lighting. A ceiling fan rotates slowly above. The room feels simple and lived-in.

Kajal sits alone on her bed, leaning against the wall with her smartphone in her hands. Her expression initially carries the same frustration and confusion from months of struggling online.

She begins scrolling through her phone attentively.

The audience never sees the phone screen.

At first, her movements are casual and skeptical. She scrolls quickly, almost absentmindedly.

Then something catches her attention.

Her thumb slows down.

She leans slightly forward.

Her eyes become more focused.

She stops scrolling and carefully watches something on the phone.

A subtle realization appears on her face.

She rewinds slightly, watches again, and nods faintly as if a concept is finally making sense.

Her posture changes from slouched and discouraged to engaged and attentive.

She begins exploring further, scrolling with purpose now.

The camera slowly pushes closer.

Kajal's expression gradually transforms:

Confused → Curious
Curious → Interested
Interested → Understanding

She occasionally raises her eyebrows in realization.

A small "aha" moment appears naturally.

She looks thoughtful, mentally connecting the dots.

For the first time, she seems to understand why her videos were not working.

She pauses, thinking deeply.

Then she looks motivated.

A faint smile appears.

Not happiness yet—just clarity.

The scene ends with Kajal sitting upright, fully focused on learning, continuing to explore her phone with renewed interest and determination.
